recommendations.title: Sing Street
recommendations.overview: A boy growing up in Dublin during the 1980s escapes his strained family life by starting a band to impress the mysterious girl he likes.

recommendations.title: Begin Again
recommendations.overview: Gretta, a budding songwriter, finds herself alone after her boyfriend Dave ditches her. Her life gains purpose when Dan, a record label executive, notices her talent.

recommendations.title: Flora and Son
recommendations.overview: Single mom Flora is at a loss about what to do with her rebellious teenage son, Max. Her efforts to keep him out of trouble lead to a beat-up acoustic guitar, a washed-up LA musician, and harmony for this frayed Dublin family.

recommendations.title: Bob Marley: One Love
recommendations.overview: Jamaican singer-songwriter Bob Marley overcomes adversity to become the most famous reggae musician in the world.

recommendations.title: A Star Is Born
recommendations.overview: Seasoned musician Jackson Maine discovers — and falls in love with — struggling artist Ally. She has just about given up on her dream to make it big as a singer — until Jack coaxes her into the spotlight. But even as Ally's career takes off, the pers

recommendations.title: August Rush
recommendations.overview: Lyla and Louis, a singer and a musician, fall in love, but are soon compelled to separate. Lyla is forced to give up her newborn but unknown to her, he grows up to become a musical genius.

recommendations.title: Shawn Mendes: In Wonder
recommendations.overview: A portrait of singer-songwriter Shawn Mendes' life, chronicling the past few years of his rise and journey.

recommendations.title: Secret Superstar
recommendations.overview: A talented teenage singer-songwriter living amid domestic abuse becomes a YouTube sensation after a video in which she hides her identity goes viral.

recommendations.title: Nana
recommendations.overview: Two girls named Nana meet on a train to Tokyo. Nana K. aims to reunite with her boyfriend and Nana O. hopes to make it big in the music business. Despite their differences, the pair hit it off and become roommates.

recommendations.title: All the Mornings of the World
recommendations.overview: Following the death of his wife, a renowned musician ostracises himself from the outer world and dedicates his life to music. However, his life changes when a young man approaches him to learn music.
